bird.name: 蓝顶鹛鸫
bird.summary: 蓝顶鹛鸫（学名：Ifrita kowaldi），又称藍冠鶥鶇，是雀形目鹛鸫科的唯一一种鸟类。 蓝顶鹛鸫体重约32.1克，翼长约79.8毫米，嘴峰长约16.3毫米，喙宽度约4.1毫米，喙厚度约4.7毫米，跗蹠长约26.8毫米，尾长约54.2毫米。蓝顶鹛鸫在其分布区内为留鸟，其栖息…

locations.name: Leslie Christidis
locations.summary: Leslie Christidis (born 30 May 1959), also simply known as Les Christidis, is an Australian ornithologist.

locations.name: 查理斯·沃爾特·德·維斯
locations.summary: 查理斯·沃爾特·德·維斯（英語：Charles Walter de Vis，1829年5月9日—1915年8月30日）， 在1882年之前稱“德維斯”（Devis），是一位英國動物學家 及鳥類學家。 德·維斯出生於英國伯明翰， 1849年…

relations.subject: 蓝顶鹛鸫
relations.evidence: thumb|Highland Papua|Highlands in New Guinea Blue-capped ifrits are endemic to Western New Guinea and Papua New Guinea, being found nowhere else on earth, with a distribution of 388,000 km2. They occur in both countries including the Southern Highlands, Western Highlands, Enga, Morobe, and Eastern Highland provinces. The species mainly lives in subtropical and tropical moist montane forests and is highly dependent on the forest ecosystem. It is found from roughly 100 to 4,000 meters (210- 12,070 ft) in elevation, though it is most commonly found at altitudes of or above
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: 蓝顶鹛鸫
relations.evidence: |date=9 November 2004 |title=Melyrid beetles (Choresine): A putative source for the batrachotoxin alkaloids found in poison-dart frogs and toxic passerine birds |journal=Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences |language=en |volume=101 |issue=45 |pages=15857–15860 |bibcode=2004PNAS..10115857D |doi=10.1073/pnas.0407197101 |issn=0027-8424 |pmc=528779 |pmid=15520388 |doi-access=free}} Despite their toxicity, blue-capped ifrits are non-aggressive and typically found in small groups within high altitude forest habitats. Although they are currently listed as Least concern by the IUCN, their population is slowly declining due to habitat disturbance and limited conservation measures
relations.object_summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。
